description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with a docker:dind service and DOCKER_DRIVER set to overlay2, defining stages check-packages, build-and-deploy, git-push-to-mirror, and update-docker-hub-readme. Add a "check-packages job" in the check-packages stage that runs on alpine:3.12 and executes `chmod +x checkpackages.sh` then `./checkpackages.sh`. Add a "build job" in the build-and-deploy stage that runs only on the master branch and runs the following commands in order: `docker info`, `echo "$CI_BUILD_TOKEN" | docker login -u gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin $CI_REGISTRY`, `DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$TMPTAG -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest -t $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:$TMPTAG -t $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:latest .`, `docker images`, `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$TMPTAG`, `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest`, `echo "$DOCKERHUB_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKERHUB_USERNAME" --password-stdin "$DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY"`, `docker push $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:$TMPTAG`, `docker push $DOCKER_REGISTRY_DOCKERHUB_REPO:latest`, `docker logout "$CI_REGISTRY"`, and `docker logout "$DOCKERHUB_REGISTRY"`, publishing images to both the GitLab Container Registry and Docker Hub. Add a "docker-hub:update-readme" job in the update-docker-hub-readme stage, also limited to master, using docker:latest with a docker:dind service, no cache, and runs `docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/Readme.md:/data/README.md -e DOCKERHUB_USERNAME="$DOCKERHUB_USERNAME" -e DOCKERHUB_PASSWORD="$DOCKERHUB_PASSWORD" -e DOCKERHUB_REPO_PREFIX="$DOCKERHUB_REPO_PREFIX" -e DOCKERHUB_REPO_NAME="$DOCKERHUB_REPO_NAME" sheogorath/readme-to-dockerhub` to update the Docker Hub repository README.
